# DESIGN.md lint baseline — RestoreAssist
# Generated 2026-05-11 when DESIGN.md adoption shipped.
# These counts represent pre-existing violations the lint warns about but does
# not block on. New violations above these numbers will fail CI.
#
# To lower a baseline after a migration: rerun the lint locally, copy the new
# count here, and commit.
#
# 2026-05-13: bumped 353 → 355. Setup wizard ships two new cards
# (components/setup/StorageCard.tsx, components/setup/IntegrationsCard.tsx)
# that use 4 lucide icons (Cloud, HardDrive, ChevronRight, KeyRound) consistent
# with the rest of the codebase. Migration to src/components/ui/marks.tsx is a
# separate cleanup tracked outside this PR.
icon_imports=355
